overview: BillKaro is a promotional website for a grocery billing app targeting Indian kirana stores. Features an animated hero with floating thermal printer invoice cards, multi-language support (Hindi, English, Marwadi, Gujarati), Shyama AI chatbot, PWA support, customer inquiry form, and a protected admin dashboard with visitor analytics and inquiry management.
features: Customer inquiry form with name, phone, and message
Admin dashboard protected by Internet Identity login
Inquiry management with WhatsApp reply buttons
Three.js animated hero with floating invoice cards
